title: Marbled's Chevon
description: A mod that adds Chevon (Goat meat)
body:
<center>

![banner](https://i.postimg.cc/sgdrfX8X/mcn-big-1.png)
![divider](https://i.postimg.cc/Jzx189wd/mcn-divider.png)

### **About**

</center>

**Marbled's Chevon** is a simple mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 & NeoForge 1.21.1 that adds Chevon, Goat meat. Since Goats don't actually drop any meat even though they are farm animals, so this mod fixes that.

<center>

![divider](https://i.postimg.cc/Jzx189wd/mcn-divider.png)

### **Features**

</center>

- Chevon
   - Comes in 2 variations; Raw Chevon and Cooked Chevon.
   - Drops 0-1 Raw Chevon upon killing Goats.

<center>

![divider](https://i.postimg.cc/Jzx189wd/mcn-divider.png)

</center>
